seoTitle: How to Earn $25 With TurboTax Refer & Earn (2026)
metaDescription: Learn how the TurboTax Refer & Earn program works, from creating your referral link to sharing it and earning $25 for each successful referral.
intro: TurboTax's Refer & Earn program lets you earn money simply by sharing your experience with people who end up filing through your link. This guide walks through creating your referral link, sharing it effectively, and understanding how the reward system works. It's a good fit for anyone who already uses TurboTax and wants an easy way to earn extra money, including freelancers and small business owners looking to supplement their income.

steps.heading: Create your TurboTax referral link
steps.body: Within your TurboTax account, generate your unique referral link, which tracks anyone who signs up and files using your specific link.

steps.heading: Share your link with others
steps.body: Send your referral link to friends, family, or your network through the channels where they're most likely to see and use it.

steps.heading: Follow best sharing practices
steps.body: Sharing your link alongside a genuine explanation of your own experience tends to be more effective than sending the link with no context.

steps.heading: Track and maximize your earnings
steps.body: Each time someone successfully uses your link to file, you earn the referral reward, so sharing consistently over time can add up.

steps.heading: Fit referrals into a broader financial strategy
steps.body: For freelancers and small business owners, referral earnings can be a small but steady addition to overall income alongside other financial strategies.

faq.question: How much can I earn per referral with TurboTax?
faq.answer: The program is designed to reward you for each person who successfully files using your referral link, based on the program's stated terms.

faq.question: Do I need to file with TurboTax myself to refer others?
faq.answer: Generally you need an active TurboTax account to generate and use a referral link, since the link is tied to your account.

faq.question: How do I know if my referral was successful?
faq.answer: You can typically track referral activity and earnings within your TurboTax account after the person you referred completes their filing.

faq.question: Is there a limit to how many people I can refer?
faq.answer: The referral program is generally built to let you share your link with multiple people, though specific limits depend on the program's current terms.

faq.question: Can businesses use the referral program as part of their marketing?
faq.answer: Some businesses incorporate referral sharing into broader marketing strategies, using their network to spread the word while earning rewards.
